step_rationale: Growth factor driving endothelial regeneration and angiogenesis post-MI.
mechanism: EREG promotes endothelial repair and angiogenic remodeling to restore coronary perfusion after MI.

references.title: DSCAML1+ extracellular vesicles revealed by single-vesicle proteomics as a novel biomarker and therapeutic target in myocardial infarction.
